{{Infobox location
| name = Rose District
| introduced = tg-02-crimson-vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Rose District]] is a location [[Alin]] enters.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c13">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Rose District]] contains experienced or powerful healers.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c7">''City of Light'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Rose District]] is a location in the City where [[Shai]] needed attention.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c27">''City of Light'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate locations]]
